score_0_not_met: No documented ISMS or security policy
score_1_partial: Policy exists but no independent certification or audit
score_2_met: Current ISO 27001 or SOC 2 Type II certification with evidence

score_0_not_met: No TLS or outdated protocol (< TLS 1.2)
score_1_partial: TLS 1.2 in place but certificate management undocumented
score_2_met: TLS 1.2+ enforced with documented certificate lifecycle

score_1_partial: Encryption at rest enabled but key management not documented
score_2_met: AES-256 or equivalent with documented key management

score_0_not_met: No clarity on data location or cross-border transfers
score_1_partial: Data location known but no transfer safeguards documented
score_2_met: Data residency confirmed; cross-border transfers covered by SCCs or adequacy decision

score_0_not_met: No centralised access control or MFA
score_1_partial: MFA available but not enforced for all privileged access
score_2_met: MFA enforced for all privileged and remote access; RBAC documented and reviewed

score_1_partial: IR plan exists but untested or not exercised in past 12 months
score_2_met: Documented IR plan exercised within past 12 months with evidence of lessons learned

score_1_partial: Notification commitment exists but exceeds 72 hours or lacks defined channel
score_2_met: Contractual commitment to notify within 72 hours via defined channel with root cause follow-up
notes: Non-negotiable: failure to meet score 2 requires escalation to risk owner

score_0_not_met: No BC/DR plan or tested backups
score_1_partial: BC/DR plan exists but RTO/RPO undefined or untested
score_2_met: Documented BC/DR with defined RTO/RPO tested within past 12 months

score_0_not_met: No evidence of vulnerability management or secure SDLC
score_1_partial: Vulnerability scanning in place but no penetration testing within 12 months
score_2_met: Annual penetration test with evidence of remediation; secure SDLC documented

score_1_partial: Logging enabled but no regular review or right-to-audit clause
score_2_met: Centralised logging with regular review; contractual right-to-audit clause in place
